background.summary: comfortable reading structure and debugging basic issues, but wants stronger foundations and more independence when starting from scratch

concepts.data_structures: comfortable in practice with common structures, but wants more depth and has little experience with trees
concepts.algorithms: can follow examples and break problems into steps, but wants more theory

tooling.git: comfortable with status/add/commit, branching basics, remote workflows, and simple conflict resolution

languages.confidence: comfortable in at least one language

systems.backend: comfortable with basic APIs, database basics, and auth basics
systems.frontend: comfortable with HTML/CSS basics and DOM/events, but frontend is not the main strength
systems.data_and_networking: comfortable with SQL basics, HTTP basics, and using APIs

learning_goal: understand concepts deeply, explain what code is doing, and apply ideas across any language
